symbols.name: check_superposition
symbols.doc: Verify superposition: H|0⟩ should give 50/50.

symbols.name: check_entanglement
symbols.doc: Verify entanglement: Bell state |00⟩ + |11⟩ has perfect correlation.

symbols.name: check_interference
symbols.doc: Verify interference: H-Z-H = X, so |0⟩ → |1⟩. Destructive interference on |0⟩, constructive on |1⟩.

symbols.name: check_phase_kickback
symbols.doc: Verify phase kickback: Deutsch's algorithm for balanced f(x)=x. Query qubit should measure |1⟩ with certainty.

symbols.name: check_no_cloning
symbols.doc: Verify no-cloning: CNOT cannot copy a superposition. If |ψ⟩ = H|0⟩ = |+⟩, then CNOT(0,1)|+,0⟩ = (|00⟩+|11⟩)/√2 (Bell state), NOT |+,+⟩ = (|00⟩+|01⟩+|10⟩+|11⟩)/2.
